titleStmt.title: SII 24.120: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 120. (A.R. No. 339 of 1952-53.) III PRĀKĀRA, SAME PLACE.

summary.p: Commences with the introduction Pūmālai miḍaindu etc. Registers a gift of land by sale, by the Śrīvaishṇava-kanmis of the temple headed by Aṇiyaraṅgadāsar and inclusive of the temple accountant Tiruvaraṅgappiriyaṉ for a flower garden called Avirōdiśīlaṉ for the god to Kāṅgaiyaṉ alias Paṭṭamuḍaiyāṉ Mūvāyirattoṟuvaṉ of Paṭṭam in Āvūrkūṟṟam in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu, at the instance of Śrīnara-vichchādira Brahma-mārāyar, the Śrīkāryam of the temple. The record is dated in the 15th regnal year of the king and furnishes details viz., Mīna, ba. 10, Wednesday, Uttirāḍam, which correspond to A.D. 1113, March, 3, Friday (not Wednesday) ·49; ·53.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svastiśrīḥ . pūmālai miṭaintu poṉ mālai tikaḻap pāmālai yaṇinta parumaṇit tiraḷpuyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppak kaṉavarai mārvan taṉateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷorutani yiruppak k(ā)laimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpinaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa
tticai toṟuṅ tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvaṉamuḻutum kavippator putumatipola veṅkuṭai miymicai niṟpa karuṅkali Oḷittu vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷattiṭait teluṅkavīmaṉ vilaṅkal mimicai Eṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyaik kanaleri parukavum Aiympaṭaip paruvattu vempa
ṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalattāṅki nitiruntu vaṭaticai vaṭippaṭuttaruḷit ten ticait tarumamum tavamum tānamum taḻaippa vetamum memmaiyum Ātiukampol talaittalai ciṟappa vantaruḷi velankaḷum porpuli yāṉaiRead velaṟkarum porpuliyāṇai •pārttivar cūṭa niṟai maṇi makuṭam murimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyiṟ kellāminnuyir tāypo
l tannaḷi parappit tanittani parantu maṇmuḻutuṅ kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttu tan koyiṟ koṟṟavāyiṟ puṟattu maṇi nāvoṭuṅka muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum melmeloṅka Ūḻi Ūḻi mānilaṅkāttu tirumaṇip poṟṟeṭṭeḻutu puttāṇṭil varumuṟai munne mannavar cumantu tiṟai kuṇarntu corinta cem poṟ
kuvaiyil tan kulanāyakan tāṇṭavam puriyum cem poṉ Ampalam cūḻ tiru māḷikaiyum kopuravāyilk kūṭa cāḷaramum Ulakuvalaṅkoṇṭoḷi viḷaṅku nemi kuḷavaRead kularai Utaiyak kunṟa moṭu ninṟeṉa pacum pon meyntu palivaḷarpiṭamum vicum poḷi taḻaippa viḷaṅku pon mentu tiru nilan=taḻaippa Imaiyavar kaḷippa periya tirunāḷ pe
rumpiyar viḻavenu Uyar puraṭṭāti Uttiraṭṭāti Ampalaniṟainta Aṟputak kūttar Inpar vāḻa Eḻuntaruḷutaṟku tirutter koyil cempon mentu paruttiraḷ muttin payil vaṭan parappi niṟaimaṇi māḷikai neṭun tiruviti tantiruvaḷarpiya rāl
ceytu camaittaruḷi pattāmāṇṭil cittirait tiṅkaḷ Attam peṟṟa Ātittavāra(ā)ttu tiruvaḷar matiyiṉ tirayodaci pakkattu Innana palavum Iṉitu camaittaruḷi tan Oru kuṭai niḻal kiḻttalamuḻutum kaḷippa ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭal puka Aḻitaru ciṅkaḷarañci neñcalamara
kaṅkar tiṟai Iṭa kannaṭar venniṭa koṅkar cāya koṅkaṇar Otuṅka maṟṟartticaiRead maṟṟetticai mannarum tan tamakkara ṇena tirumalar cevaṭiyurimaiyil Iṟaiñca terivaiyar tilatam tiyāka patākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punita kuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuḻutuṭai yāḷena vuṭaniruppa neṭumā(l)lākaRead *ttuttaṉi tirumakaḷḷena mātar maṭamayil
pūtalattaruntuti Araṇiyakalappil tara(ra)ṇimuḻutuṭai yāḷivaḷen tirumaṇimāvat taruḷḷuṭan Iruppa vīrasiṅhāsanattu tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu . minanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum puta
n kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattināḷ tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār koyilukku śrīkāriyañ ceykira śrīnaraviccātirabrammādhirāyar Ēvalpaṭi śrīvayiṣṇavaril Aṇiyaraṅkatāsarum Aruḷmārittiruttāḻkaṇṭarum parakecari śrīkārimāṟa nampiyu
m tiruviṇṇakar nampiyum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Arumāritāsarum Iṭavai nārā yaṇa nampiyum kanta māḷi nampiyum nālūrt tirumā laitanta dāsarum paḷḷikoṇṭān paṭṭarum śrīvayiṣṇavakkankāṇi muṅkil kuṭi makuḻalaṅkāṟitāsarum
kantāṭai śrīcaṭakopa nampiyum Irāyūr śrīcaṭakopa nampiyum śrīvattappiriyatāsarum paṭṭarum tiruvaḻuntūr ci Arumāri nampiyum śrīpaṇṭāravā riyam pāratāyan karuṇākaran cirāmappaṭṭanum Āritan puṇṭarikan peru
yāmuṭaiyānum pāratāyan tiruvāykulamuṭaiyān tiruvaraṅkamāḷipaṭṭanum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutanāna Arumāri nampiyum pāratāyan tiruveṅkaṭavan ciṅkappirānum kovil kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkappiriyanuḷḷiṭṭa kanmikaḷom nittavino
tavaḷanāṭṭu Āvūr kūṟṟattu paṭṭattu paṭṭa muṭaiyān veḷān muvāyirattoruvanāna kāṅkaiyarku Ivūr Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkuc ceyvikkiṟa tirunantavānam Aviroticilan tirunan=tavānattukku tirunantavānappuramānaRead puṟamāka
nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Irājamahentiravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭut tiru varaṅkattāḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna ney cāttiyaruḷat tiṭṭaikuṭic colai Aracu pāṇṭavatūtanāna Irājādhirāja
brahmārāyan ceyvittac colai Aracuviḷākattukku meṟkum kāraikkuṭi nattattiṟku vaṭakkum viracoḻapallavaraiyaṉ tirunantavānappuṟamāna rāmaviḷākattuk kiḻakkum Uttamacoḻa peruvāykkālukkut teṟkum Ā
ka Ivvicainta perunānkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilam mukkāl Innilam mukkālum kkuṭala tyasamma Uttecam pāḻāyk kiṭantamaiyil Ikkāṅkaiyar The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
